descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Quesnel Millionaires 4-3 in opening game of B.C. Tier-Two junior hockey championship series.
descriptionLong: Richmond Sockeyes, B.C. Junior League champions, opened their B.C. Tier-Two junior hockey championship series with a 4-3 victory over Quesnel Millionaires, Peace-Cariboo League champions, on Friday night. The second game of the best-of-three series was scheduled for Saturday night in Richmond.
